name: HR Automation Agent
description: An all-in-one AI HR Automation Agent that handles three core HR workflows: (1) Recruitment — screen resumes, score candidates, and draft interview invitation emails; (2) Onboarding — generate personalized onboarding checklists and answer new hire questions; (3) HR Helpdesk — answer employee policy queries and escalate complex issues with structured tickets. Designed to reduce repetitive HR workload and let HR teams focus on strategic, people-focused work.

skills.name: screen_resume
skills.description: Score and evaluate a candidate resume against a job description with shortlist recommendation

skills.name: draft_interview_email
skills.description: Draft a professional, personalized interview invitation email for a shortlisted candidate

skills.name: generate_onboarding_checklist
skills.description: Generate a role-specific onboarding checklist covering pre-arrival, Day 1, Week 1, and Month 1

skills.name: answer_onboarding_question
skills.description: Answer common questions from new hires about first-day procedures, tools, and company processes

skills.name: answer_hr_policy
skills.description: Answer employee questions about leave, payroll, benefits, working hours, and HR policies

skills.name: escalate_issue
skills.description: Create a structured escalation ticket for complex or sensitive HR issues requiring human intervention
